mapper.select: SELECT CAT_ID AS "catId", TITLE AS "title", DEPT AS "dept", SEQ AS "seq", CREATED_AT AS "createdAt" FROM LS_CATEGORY ORDER BY SEQ, CREATED_AT
SELECT CAT_ID AS "catId", TITLE AS "title", DEPT AS "dept", SEQ AS "seq", CREATED_AT AS "createdAt" FROM LS_CATEGORY WHERE CAT_ID = #{catId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LS_CATEGORY (CAT_ID, TITLE, DEPT, SEQ, CREATED_AT) VALUES (LOWER(RAWTOHEX(SYS_GUID())), #{title}, #{dept}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM LS_CATEGORY), SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT TASK_ID AS "taskId", CAT_ID AS "catId", TITLE AS "title", SEQ AS "seq", CREATED_AT AS "createdAt" FROM LS_TASK WHERE CAT_ID = #{catId} ORDER BY SEQ, CREATED_AT
SELECT TASK_ID AS "taskId", CAT_ID AS "catId", TITLE AS "title", SEQ AS "seq", CREATED_AT AS "createdAt" FROM LS_TASK WHERE CAT_ID = #{catId} AND TASK_ID = #{taskId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LS_TASK WHERE CAT_ID = #{catId} AND (SEQ < (SELECT SEQ FROM LS_TASK WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId}) OR (SEQ = (SELECT SEQ FROM LS_TASK WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId}) AND CREATED_AT < (SELECT CREATED_AT FROM LS_TASK WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId})))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LS_TASK (TASK_ID, CAT_ID, TITLE, SEQ, CREATED_AT) VALUES (LOWER(RAWTOHEX(SYS_GUID())), #{catId}, #{title}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM LS_TASK WHERE CAT_ID = #{catId}), SYSDATE)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM LS_TASK WHERE CAT_ID = #{catId} AND TASK_ID = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LS_TASK_DETAIL WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId}

SELECT TASK_ID AS "taskId", KPI_NAME AS "kpiName", SUB_ITEM AS "subItem", TO_CHAR(BG_ENV) AS "bgEnv", TO_CHAR(BG_LEADER) AS "bgLeader", TO_CHAR(DIRECTION) AS "direction", ACT_TYPE AS "actType", TO_CHAR(ACT_MAIN) AS "actMain", TO_CHAR(ACT_DETAIL) AS "actDetail", TO_CHAR(SCHEDULE) AS "schedule", TO_CHAR(EXPECTED) AS "expected", UPDATED_AT AS "updatedAt" FROM LS_TASK_DETAIL WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LS_TASK_DETAIL (TASK_ID, KPI_NAME, SUB_ITEM, BG_ENV, BG_LEADER, DIRECTION, ACT_TYPE, ACT_MAIN, ACT_DETAIL, SCHEDULE, EXPECTED, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{kpiName}, #{subItem}, #{bgEnv}, #{bgLeader}, #{direction}, #{actType}, #{actMain}, #{actDetail}, #{schedule}, #{expected}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE LS_TASK_DETAIL SET KPI_NAME = #{kpiName}, SUB_ITEM = #{subItem}, BG_ENV = #{bgEnv}, BG_LEADER = #{bgLeader}, DIRECTION = #{direction}, ACT_TYPE = #{actType}, ACT_MAIN = #{actMain}, ACT_DETAIL = #{actDetail}, SCHEDULE = #{schedule}, EXPECTED = #{expected}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT TASK_ID AS "taskId", MONTH_NUM AS "monthNum", PLAN AS "plan", RESULT AS "result" FROM LS_TASK_MONTH WHERE TASK_ID = #{taskId} ORDER BY MONTH_NUM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LS_TASK_MONTH (TASK_ID, MONTH_NUM, PLAN, RESULT) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{monthNum}, #{plan}, #{result})
mapper.select: SELECT GOAL_ID AS "goalId", TITLE AS "title", SEQ AS "seq", CREATED_AT AS "createdAt" FROM CT_GOAL ORDER BY SEQ, CREATED_AT
SELECT GOAL_ID AS "goalId", TITLE AS "title", SEQ AS "seq", CREATED_AT AS "createdAt" FROM CT_GOAL WHERE GOAL_ID = #{goalId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CT_GOAL (GOAL_ID, TITLE, SEQ, CREATED_AT) VALUES (LOWER(RAWTOHEX(SYS_GUID())), #{title}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM CT_GOAL), SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT i.IND_ID AS "indId", i.GOAL_ID AS "goalId", i.TITLE AS "title", i.SEQ AS "seq", i.CREATED_AT AS "createdAt", d.NAME AS "name", d.DEPT AS "dept", d.QUANT AS "quant", d.T1 AS "t1", d.T2 AS "t2", d.T3 AS "t3", d.FORECAST AS "forecast" FROM CT_INDICATOR i LEFT JOIN CT_INDICATOR_DETAIL d ON i.IND_ID = d.IND_ID WHERE i.GOAL_ID = #{goalId} ORDER BY i.SEQ, i.CREATED_AT
SELECT IND_ID AS "indId", GOAL_ID AS "goalId", TITLE AS "title", SEQ AS "seq", CREATED_AT AS "createdAt" FROM CT_INDICATOR WHERE IND_ID = #{indId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CT_INDICATOR (IND_ID, GOAL_ID, TITLE, SEQ, CREATED_AT) VALUES (LOWER(RAWTOHEX(SYS_GUID())), #{goalId}, #{title}, (SELECT NVL(MAX(SEQ), 0) + 1 FROM CT_INDICATOR WHERE GOAL_ID = #{goalId}), SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT IND_ID FROM CT_INDICATOR WHERE GOAL_ID = #{goalId} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CT_INDICATOR_DETAIL WHERE IND_ID = #{indId}

SELECT IND_ID AS "indId", NAME AS "name", DEPT AS "dept", QUANT AS "quant", T1 AS "t1", T2 AS "t2", T3 AS "t3", FORECAST AS "forecast", TO_CHAR(PLAN) AS "plan", UPDATED_AT AS "updatedAt" FROM CT_INDICATOR_DETAIL WHERE IND_ID = #{indId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CT_INDICATOR_DETAIL (IND_ID, NAME, DEPT, QUANT, T1, T2, T3, FORECAST, PLAN, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{indId}, #{name}, #{dept}, #{quant}, #{t1}, #{t2}, #{t3}, #{forecast}, #{plan}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE CT_INDICATOR_DETAIL SET NAME = #{name}, DEPT = #{dept}, QUANT = #{quant}, T1 = #{t1}, T2 = #{t2}, T3 = #{t3}, FORECAST = #{forecast}, PLAN = #{plan}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE IND_ID = #{indId}
mapper.select: SELECT IND_ID AS "indId", MONTH_NUM AS "monthNum", PLAN AS "plan", RESULT AS "result" FROM CT_IND_MONTH WHERE IND_ID = #{indId} ORDER BY MONTH_NUM
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CT_IND_MONTH (IND_ID, MONTH_NUM, PLAN, RESULT) VALUES (#{indId}, #{monthNum}, #{plan}, #{result})
mapper.select: SELECT SUB_TASK_ID AS "subTaskId", IND_ID AS "indId", TITLE AS "title" FROM CT_SUB_TASK WHERE SUB_TASK_ID = #{subTaskId}

SELECT ACT_ID AS "actId", CATEGORY AS "category", TITLE AS "title", TYPE_PRIMARY AS "typePrimary", TYPE_SECONDARY AS "typeSecondary", ACT_DATE AS "actDate", PROOF AS "proof", STATUS AS "status", CREATED_AT AS "createdAt", UPDATED_AT AS "updatedAt" FROM ACT_MAIN WHERE STATUS != 'deleted' ORDER BY ACT_DATE DESC, CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT ACT_ID AS "actId", CATEGORY AS "category", TITLE AS "title", TYPE_PRIMARY AS "typePrimary", TYPE_SECONDARY AS "typeSecondary", ACT_DATE AS "actDate", PROOF AS "proof", STATUS AS "status", CREATED_AT AS "createdAt", UPDATED_AT AS "updatedAt" FROM ACT_MAIN WHERE CATEGORY = #{category} AND STATUS != 'deleted' ORDER BY ACT_DATE DESC, CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT ACT_ID AS "actId", CATEGORY AS "category", TITLE AS "title", TO_CHAR(RECOGNITION) AS "recognition", TO_CHAR(DIRECTION) AS "direction", TYPE_PRIMARY AS "typePrimary", TYPE_SECONDARY AS "typeSecondary", TO_CHAR(CONTENT) AS "content", ACT_DATE AS "actDate", PROOF AS "proof", STATUS AS "status", CREATED_AT AS "createdAt", UPDATED_AT AS "updatedAt" FROM ACT_MAIN WHERE ACT_ID = #{actId}
SELECT CAT_ID AS "catId", TITLE AS "title" FROM LS_CATEGORY ORDER BY SEQ, CREATED_AT
SELECT IND_ID AS "indId", TITLE AS "title" FROM CT_INDICATOR ORDER BY SEQ, CREATED_AT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ACT_MAIN (ACT_ID, CATEGORY, TITLE, RECOGNITION, DIRECTION, TYPE_PRIMARY, TYPE_SECONDARY, CONTENT, ACT_DATE, PROOF, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (#{actId}, #{category}, #{title}, #{recognition}, #{direction}, #{typePrimary}, #{typeSecondary}, #{content}, #{actDate}, #{proof}, #{status}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE ACT_MAIN SET CATEGORY = #{category}, TITLE = #{title}, RECOGNITION = #{recognition}, DIRECTION = #{direction}, TYPE_PRIMARY = #{typePrimary}, TYPE_SECONDARY = #{typeSecondary}, CONTENT = #{content}, ACT_DATE = #{actDate}, PROOF = #{proof}, STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE ACT_ID = #{actId}
mapper.select: SELECT IND_ID AS "id", IND_LABEL AS "label" FROM ACT_INDICATOR WHERE ACT_ID = #{actId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ACT_INDICATOR (ACT_ID, IND_ID, IND_LABEL) VALUES (#{actId}, #{indId}, #{indLabel})
